505 N Lapham Peak Rd, Delafield, WI 53018, USA
Several large trees on the edge of the clearing Falling Fruit season: October-November.
Multiple shrubs along the north side of trail. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
Several good bushes in a row on west and east sides of the trail Falling Fruit season: September-October.
4 service entry bushes as landscaping at the Y. But one looks badly diseased. The others have a lot of fruit. Falling Fruit season: June-June.

Large Black walnut tree produced heavily in 2014 on the south side of the long trail that circles Nature Hill. Several individuals of the same species can be found on the path from the parking lot to this tree. Falling Fruit season: September-November.

Nettle growing tall in and through clearing into elderberry low land. Garlic mustard (try the leaves and tasty root in spring or fall) borders edges. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: April-September.
Black raspberry fills the understory of this incline north of the long, circular trail. Prolific fruits spring 2015 Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
